description: Integrates Cookie Information consent popup with Piwik PRO. Maps Cookie Information cookie categories (functional, statistic, marketing, unclassified) to Piwik PRO consent types. Enables consent-based tag triggering and consent statistics in reports. Requires Cookie Information popup installed and Piwik PRO consent settings enabled. Available from 18.12.0.

when_to_use: Using Cookie Information as consent provider with Piwik PRO
Syncing consent choices from Cookie Information banner to Piwik PRO
Triggering tags based on consents collected via Cookie Information
Building consent-based audiences in Customer Data Platform
common_use_cases: Replace Piwik PRO Consent Manager with Cookie Information
Unified consent across Cookie Information and Piwik PRO
Consent statistics in Piwik PRO reports
GDPR-compliant consent flow with third-party CMP

consent_type.description: Must be 'not_require_consent'. This tag only maps consents; it must fire regardless of consent.
consent_type.recommendation: Always use not_require_consent - tag syncs consent data, does not track

template_options.description: Consent mapping configuration. Must include consents_mapping.

template_options.consents_mapping.description: Map Cookie Information cookie categories to Piwik PRO consent types. Each category maps to an array of Piwik PRO consent types. Necessary cookies are fixed to 'No consent required'.

template_options.consents_mapping.cookie.description: Piwik PRO consent types for Cookie Information 'Functional' category. Necessary cookies are fixed to no-consent-required internally.
Piwik PRO consent types for Cookie Information 'Statistical' category. Map to analytics for Piwik PRO tag.
Piwik PRO consent types for Cookie Information 'Marketing' category.
Piwik PRO consent types for Cookie Information 'Unclassified' category.

respect_visitors_privacy.description: Respect DNT and opt-out. Should be off - tag is not tracking.
respect_visitors_privacy.recommendation: Keep false so consent sync works regardless of DNT/opt-out

disable_in_debug_mode.description: Disable when Tag Manager is in debug mode

scheduler.description: Flight dates - when the tag should fire

default_mapping.description: Cookie Information integration with default mapping (Set defaults in UI)
default_mapping.prerequisite: Install Cookie Information popup. Enable custom consent form and 'Ask visitors for consent' in Piwik PRO Administration. Turn off Shared consent in Cookie Information. Use 'All page views' trigger.

analytics_focused.description: Map Statistical to analytics for Piwik PRO tracking

update_example.description: Update consent mapping (requires Reset consent in Cookie Information after change)
update_example.prerequisite: After changing mapping, click Reset consent in Cookie Information > Consent solutions > Settings > Ask visitors for consent

common_mistakes: Using consent_type other than not_require_consent - tag must fire to sync consents
Enabling respect_visitors_privacy - prevents consent sync for DNT users
Forgetting to map cookie_cat_statistic to analytics - Piwik PRO tag needs analytics consent
Not resetting consent in Cookie Information after changing mapping
Enabling Shared consent in Cookie Information (use first-party only)
Using wrong trigger - must use All page views

consents_not_syncing: Verify Cookie Information popup is installed
Turn off Shared consent in Cookie Information
Enable custom consent form in Piwik PRO Administration
Ensure consent_type is not_require_consent and respect_visitors_privacy is false
tags_not_firing_after_consent: Map Cookie Information categories to correct Piwik PRO consent types
Piwik PRO tag needs analytics - map Statistical to analytics
Reset consent in Cookie Information after mapping changes
consent_stats_delayed: Reports: allow ~2 hours for consent statistics
Tracker debugger: view consent state instantly
